name: RMW - Bofors AK5
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The green menace of the north. Swedish standard issue assault rifle. Rugged and reliable. Also known to be used by the Löckelle Homeguard and was the weapon of choice of Löckelle armed police during the hostage situation in Frustrum in 2002. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
